title: Lead Frontend Developer at Amazon India Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Lead Frontend Developer at Amazon India Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Amazon India Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Frontend Developer at our Nashik office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Amazon India Advisory Limited:
Amazon India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon India Advisory Limited!
